title: Orthogonality Scaling Law at 7B+
hypothesis: The null interaction between PR expansion surgery and Gaussian jitter stress observed at sub-3B scale (exp-012/013) generalizes to 7B+ models across all four paradigms (transformer, SSM, hybrid, reasoning). Pre-specified SESOI: interaction OR within [0.90, 1.11], target ROPE fraction >= 0.95.
value_to_investors: If confirmed, orthogonality-based independent testing protocols are validated across the deployment-relevant 7B+ scale. If refuted, scale-specific interaction testing is required, increasing deployment validation cost.
value_to_researchers: Tests external validity of orthogonality finding beyond sub-3B models. Introduces scale-moderation meta-regression pooling three experiments (012/013/014) to quantify whether interaction varies with model size. Fills reasoning paradigm gap from exp-013.
identification_strategy: Focused 2x2 factorial at mid-layer (0.5) with fixed strengths (surgery=0.08, jitter=0.08). 7 seeds for precision. 64 short-answer prompts (32 cal + 32 holdout). Interaction tested via clustered logistic regression, bootstrap (5000), permutation (5000), LOO, and LOPO. Scale-moderation via linear regression of interaction on log10(params_b) pooled across exp-012/013/014.
falsification_tests: Interaction OR outside ROPE [0.90, 1.11] at 7B+ scale would falsify scale generalization
Reasoning-only interaction significantly different from zero would indicate paradigm-specific coupling
Scale-moderation slope significantly different from zero (p<0.05) would indicate scale-dependent interaction
Calibration-holdout gap >5pp would indicate prompt-level overfitting
success_criteria: >=6 of 8 models complete, with >=1 per paradigm (transformer, SSM, hybrid, reasoning)
Scale-moderation slope not significant (p>0.05) when pooled with exp-012/013

data_lineage.provenance: 8 models at 7B+ across 4 paradigms (transformer, SSM, hybrid, reasoning), NF4 quantized via bitsandbytes on RTX 5090 Laptop (25.7GB VRAM)
data_lineage.transformations: Forward pass with hook-based hidden-state perturbation at mid-layer, greedy decoding (max_new_tokens=10), strict answer parsing with numeric extraction

out_of_sample_validation_plan: 32 calibration prompts used for analysis tuning; 32 holdout prompts reserved for final validation. All statistics computed on both splits with divergence check.
uncertainty_methods: Bootstrap CIs (5000 resamples over model-level means)
Permutation null distribution (5000 shuffles of surgery/jitter labels within model)
ROPE equivalence testing with pre-specified bounds [0.90, 1.11]
robustness_checks: Paradigm-specific interaction analysis (transformer vs SSM vs hybrid vs reasoning)
Main effects analysis (surgery and jitter independently)
